verses.1: One who loves discipline loves knowledge, But one who hates rebuke is stupid.
verses.2: A good person will obtain favor from the LORD, But He will condemn a person who devises evil.
verses.3: A person will not be established by wickedness, But the root of the righteous will not be moved.
verses.4: An excellent wife is the crown of her husband, But she who shames him is like rottenness in his bones.
verses.5: The thoughts of the righteous are just, But the counsels of the wicked are deceitful.
verses.6: The words of the wicked wait in ambush for blood, But the mouth of the upright will rescue them.
verses.7: The wicked are overthrown and are no more, But the house of the righteous will stand.
verses.8: A person will be praised according to his insight, But one of perverse mind will be despised.
verses.9: Better is one who is lightly esteemed and has a servant, Than one who honors himself and lacks bread.
verses.10: A righteous person has regard for the life of his animal, But even the compassion of the wicked is cruel.
verses.11: One who works his land will have plenty of bread, But one who pursues worthless things lacks sense.
verses.12: The wicked person desires the plunder of evil people, But the root of the righteous yields fruit.
verses.13: An evil person is ensnared by the offense of his lips, But the righteous will escape from trouble.
verses.14: A person will be satisfied with good by the fruit of his words, And the deeds of a person’s hands will return to him.
verses.15: The way of a fool is right in his own eyes, But a person who listens to advice is wise.
verses.16: A fool’s anger is known at once, But a prudent person conceals dishonor.
verses.17: One who declares truth tells what is right, But a false witness, deceit.
verses.18: There is one who speaks rashly like the thrusts of a sword, But the tongue of the wise brings healing.
verses.19: Truthful lips will endure forever, But a lying tongue is only for a moment.
verses.20: Deceit is in the heart of those who devise evil, But counselors of peace have joy.
verses.21: No harm happens to the righteous, But the wicked are filled with trouble.
verses.22: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD, But those who deal faithfully are His delight.
verses.23: A prudent person conceals knowledge, But the heart of fools proclaims foolishness.
verses.24: The hand of the diligent will rule, But the lazy hand will be put to forced labor.
verses.25: Anxiety in a person’s heart weighs it down, But a good word makes it glad.
verses.26: The righteous person is a guide to his neighbor, But the way of the wicked leads them astray.
verses.27: A lazy person does not roast his prey, But the precious possession of a person is diligence.
verses.28: In the way of righteousness there is life, And in its pathway there is no death.
